candidate_prompt_components.response_contract: Return strict JSON probabilities over the available policy alternatives.

segment_prompt.fixed_income_inflation_stressed: Apply synchronized program for fixed_income_inflation_stressed. Mode: numeric_anchor. Keep the accepted relief-first ordering as the numeric anchor for the synchronized program. Interpret this candidate through a narrowed segment program. Prefer the strongest synchronized signal only; drop weak decorative spread. Interpret this candidate through the finite route-combo coverage program. Combo: R3-A segment + latent hybrid. Variant: strong_counterfactual_bridge. Stress-test whether a stronger combined correction can break the weak ceiling.
segment_prompt.income_band=low: Apply route-combo coverage control for income_band=low. Combo: R3-A segment + latent hybrid. Variant intent: Stress-test whether a stronger combined correction can break the weak ceiling. Secondary prompt hint: Apply the round1 latent regime for income_band=low. Intent: preserve low-income ordering while shape correction is primary. Treat this as a coordinated latent-family shift rather than a local prompt rewrite.
segment_prompt.price_stress_level=high: Apply synchronized program for price_stress_level=high. Mode: numeric_anchor. Under high price stress, keep rebate support visible while avoiding a single-policy spike.
segment_prompt.working_family_price_stressed: Apply route-combo coverage control for working_family_price_stressed. Combo: R3-A segment + latent hybrid. Variant intent: Stress-test whether a stronger combined correction can break the weak ceiling. Secondary prompt hint: Keep this segment near its calibration-split baseline response profile. Do not let food_subsidy_expansion exceed 0.250. Keep cash_cost_of_living_rebate at or above 0.410 when feasible. Interpret this response through the round1 latent response program family. Keep rank repair and distribution-shape stabilization jointly coherent.
